title: [Abuse] Warning: www(dot)launtonwealth(dot)com
text: The operators of the website www(dot)launtonwealth(dot)com (or a similar form) are purporting to be a brand of an authorized insurance intermediary company in Liechtenstein, Finanz-Control Anstalt, Heiligkreuz 52, 9490 Vaduz, Commercial Register No. FL-0001.536.585-0. The operators of www(dot)launtonwealth(dot)com do not have an authorization of the Financial Market Authority (FMA) Liechtenstein or a domicile in Liechtenstein. The FMA points out that there is no connection between www.(dot)launtonwealth(dot)com and Finanz-Control Anstalt. The FMA points out that the operators of www(dot)launtonwealth(dot)com are not allowed to provide any financial services that are subject to authorization.
